# Muditek — AI Systems That Eliminate Operational Waste

> Muditek diagnoses where companies lose money to manual operations and builds the AI systems that fix it. Founded by Ghiles Moussaoui. Based in Europe. 35+ AI systems deployed in 2026 across telecom, B2B SaaS, agencies, private equity, and fintech. Every engagement starts with a paid or free diagnostic that quantifies the waste in euros — with formulas, not estimates — before any code is written. If the diagnostic can't find meaningful waste, the client doesn't pay. Clients own the source code, infrastructure, and data. No SaaS subscriptions. No vendor lock-in.

This file is the long-form companion to https://muditek.com/llms.txt — designed for AI engines (ChatGPT search, Claude search, Perplexity, Bing/Copilot, Google AI Overview) to retrieve and cite accurate, structured information about Muditek's services, methodology, pricing, guarantees, case studies, and founder.

Last updated: 2026-05-04. Author: Ghiles Moussaoui. Site: https://muditek.com.

---

## Founder

**Ghiles Moussaoui** — engineer turned operator. Founder of Muditek. Started building automation systems for B2B founders in 2024 and now runs Muditek full-time. Reaches 35,000+ B2B operators and AI builders weekly through LinkedIn and a 5,000+ subscriber newsletter. Based in Europe, working with clients across telecom, B2B SaaS, agencies, investment banking, and fintech.

- Website: https://muditek.com
- About page: https://muditek.com/about
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ghiles-moussaoui-b36218250/
- Personal site: https://ghiless.com
- Newsletter: https://muditek.com/newsletter
- Booking: 30-minute call via https://muditek.com/about

Ghiles built mudiAgent (the on-premises AI system) to run Muditek's own operations first. When clients saw the results, they asked Muditek to deploy it for them. The track record:

- 35+ systems deployed
- $3M+ in client revenue generated and saved
- 26-module operational platform delivered for a regulated merchant banking firm in 3 months
- 5,000+ B2B operators reading the weekly playbooks
- 35,000+ LinkedIn followers across telecom, SaaS, finance, and AI operator communities
- 29 newsletter issues shipped through 2026
- 15M+ LinkedIn impressions

---

## Three Service Offers

Muditek operates three primary service offers, each with a different ICP (ideal customer profile), price point, and guarantee. Each starts with a diagnostic.

### 1. mudiAgent — On-Premises Digital Employees

URL: https://muditek.com/mudiagent
ICP: Telecom operators, traders, and integrators with 50+ employees. Also enterprises with regulated data, OSS/BSS systems, and a NOC team.
Price: Free Discovery Audit (€0) → Pilot Deployment (€15,000+) → Monthly Retainer (€3,000/mo)
Guarantee: 40 hours saved weekly in 90 days, or Muditek reconfigures the system at no additional cost.
Time to live: 4-8 weeks from kickoff.

mudiAgent is not a chatbot. It is a digital employee that runs on a device installed in the client's office. No cloud. No per-user fees. Data never leaves the building. The system reads WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, email, files, vendor portals, CRM, ERP, NOC tooling, ticketing systems (ServiceNow, Jira), file servers, OSS/BSS, and databases. It executes work autonomously on a schedule — daily reports at 6 a.m., weekly summaries on Friday, follow-ups when due, monitoring around the clock.

Why on-premises matters: 82% of data breaches involve cloud-stored data (IBM 2024). Cloud AI tools like ChatGPT Enterprise and Microsoft Copilot upload everything to US/EU servers. mudiAgent eliminates that risk entirely. Full audit trail. Complete data sovereignty. The device sits inside the client's existing network.

What mudiAgent automates (real, deployed examples):
- Weekly SLA reporting in NOCs: 2-3 days → under 1 hour
- Knowledge search across shared drives: 45 minutes → 10 seconds
- Field report formatting from voice notes: 90 minutes → automatic
- Follow-ups across email and WhatsApp: falling through cracks → 24/7 automatic
- Proposal drafting from existing templates: 4 hours → 12 minutes
- Daily competitor intelligence pulls: manual and sporadic → daily at 7 a.m.

Why not ChatGPT or Microsoft Copilot? ChatGPT can't read WhatsApp, send emails, fill the CRM, or run at 6 a.m. It is a conversation tool. The user types, the model responds, and it forgets everything. mudiAgent operates real software autonomously, on schedule, and remembers everything. Cloud AI also costs 3-5x more at enterprise scale (a16z 2025) because per-user pricing punishes scaling. mudiAgent has no per-user fees — one device, everyone uses it.

Process:
- Week 1: Free Discovery Audit. Map the workflows that eat the team's time. Identify the top 3 highest-impact automation targets. Estimate hours and cost recoverable. Client gets a written automation roadmap, even if they go no further.
- Week 2-4: Configure & Deploy. mudiAgent arrives pre-configured. Connected to email, WhatsApp, CRM, ticketing, file servers. Trained on the client's documents and templates. First agents go live doing real work — not demos, not proofs of concept.
- Month 2-3: Prove & Scale. Hours saved measured. Reports produced. Response times cut. Client sees the numbers. Then scaling — more workflows, more departments, more sites.

Pricing rationale: a mid-size telecom team (50 employees, 20 in operations) typically loses 832 hours/year to manual reporting alone, and another 2,500+ hours/year to knowledge search at 30 min × 5 searches/day × 20 people. That's €200,000+/year in wasted engineer time — equivalent to 2-3 engineer salaries. mudiAgent recovers a fraction of that in the first month and pays for itself within 90 days.

Comparison page: https://muditek.com/mudiagent-vs-chatgpt
Industry pages: https://muditek.com/who-we-help/telecom

FAQ — mudiAgent:

Q: We can build this ourselves with ChatGPT.
A: ChatGPT can't read your WhatsApp, send emails, fill your CRM, or run at 6 a.m. It's a conversation tool. mudiAgent is a digital employee that executes real work on your infrastructure, autonomously, on schedule, and remembers everything.

Q: What about data security?
A: Everything runs on a device in your office. Your data never touches the internet. 82% of data breaches involve cloud-stored data (IBM 2024). mudiAgent eliminates that risk entirely. Full audit trail. Complete data sovereignty.

Q: What if it doesn't work?
A: If mudiAgent doesn't save your team at least 40 hours in the first 90 days, we reconfigure until it does, at no additional cost. Most deployments recover 40+ hours in the first month.

Q: How long does deployment take?
A: Week 1: free discovery audit. Week 2-4: configure and deploy. First agents go live within the first month. No multi-year implementation projects.

Q: What systems does it connect to?
A: CRM, ERP, ticketing systems (ServiceNow, Jira), NMS, OSS/BSS, Google Workspace, SharePoint, email, WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, databases, vendor portals, browsers. If a human can use it at a desk, mudiAgent can operate it.

---

### 2. Revenue Leak Audit — B2B SaaS Pipeline Diagnostics

URL: https://muditek.com/revenue-leak-audit
ICP: B2B SaaS founders at €800K-€1.8M ARR with 2-5 sales reps using HubSpot or Salesforce.
Price: Diagnostic (€2,000-3,000) → Build the Fix (€5,000-8,000 per leak) → Monthly Retainer (€3,000-5,000/mo)
Guarantee: €50,000 in annual leakage found in the diagnostic, or the client pays nothing.
Time to deliverable: 5 days for the diagnostic.

The Revenue Leak Audit diagnoses where B2B SaaS pipelines lose €80,000-€180,000/year. Every leak is shown in euros, with the formula behind it, using the client's actual numbers — not estimates.

The 5 leak categories diagnosed:

1. Speed-to-lead. Formula: response time × leads × conversion decay rate. Average inbound response time in B2B SaaS is 42 hours. Conversion drops 80% after the first 5 minutes. 100 leads/month × €10K ACV × 80% degraded = €80,000/year gone.

2. Pipeline conversion. Formula: stage gap vs benchmark × deal size × volume. Typical demo-to-close rate at this stage is 12%. The benchmark is 20-25%. That 8-13 point gap × €8K average deal × 200 opportunities = €128,000-€208,000/year left on the table.

3. Lead source ROI. Formula: spend per channel vs revenue attributed. Most teams spend €30K/year on a paid channel that produces €10K in pipeline. Nobody runs the analysis because the data lives in three different systems and the founder doesn't have time to build the dashboard.

4. Churn & expansion. Formula: excess churn rate × MRR × 12. 5% excess churn on €80K MRR = €48,000/year walking out the door.

5. Outbound performance. Formula: response rate gap × meetings missed × close rate × ACV. 0.5% meeting rate vs 2% benchmark = 30 missed meetings/month × 20% close rate × €8K ACV = €576,000/year in missed pipeline.

Three deliverables in the diagnostic (Day 5):
- Leak Diagnostic Report — 12-page PDF + spreadsheet covering all 5 categories with euro impact, formula, and fix priority ranking.
- Implementation Roadmap — sprint-by-sprint plan to fix the leaks by euro impact. Includes formulas, n8n workflows, scripts, and integration points. The client's developer can build it. Muditek can build it.
- Recovery Calculator — live spreadsheet that runs the client's actual numbers through each fix. Shows 3-year compounding ROI per leak.

Why now: VCs now value profitability over growth. Broken unit economics = no next round. CAC has inverted ($2 to acquire $1 of ARR is now common). Demo-to-close conversion is down. Sales cycles are longer. You can't outspend broken operations. Revenue ops is the only lever left.

Process:
- Diagnostic (€2,000-3,000, 5 days): Client fills out a 15-minute intake form. Grants read-only access to CRM and Stripe (10 minutes). Muditek does the rest. Day 5: prioritized leak report with euro amounts, formulas, fix roadmap, and competitive benchmark against published industry data. Total client effort: ~1.5 hours.
- Build the Fix (€5,000-8,000 per fix, 1-2 weeks each): Client picks which leak to fix first. Speed-to-lead automation, pipeline scoring, outbound rebuild — whatever the diagnostic prioritizes. The client owns the system. No SaaS fees. Pays for itself in month 1. Typical: 3 fixes, €18,000 total.
- Retainer (€3,000-5,000/month, ongoing): Monthly Revenue Recovery Report showing exactly how much the system recovered in euros. 3-5x return every billing cycle. System monitoring, one optimization cycle per month, priority support. Client effort: ~1 hr/month.

Industry pages: https://muditek.com/who-we-help/b2b-saas
Free tool: https://muditek.com/tools/revenue-leak-calculator
Lead magnet: The 5-Leak Diagnostic Framework (the methodology with formulas, benchmark sources, self-assessment worksheet).

FAQ — Revenue Leak Audit:

Q: We can do this ourselves.
A: You've had the CRM data for 18 months. If your team was going to fix it, they would have. The diagnostic shows you what to fix. That alone is worth €2-3K even if you build it yourself.

Q: We don't have the budget.
A: The diagnostic typically finds €80-180K in annual leakage. You're spending more by NOT doing this.

Q: What if the diagnostic finds nothing?
A: If we can't find at least €50K in annual leakage, you pay nothing. That's the guarantee.

Q: What if the fix doesn't work?
A: If you buy within 14 days of receiving the diagnostic, you get 30 days of post-build optimization included free. The system doesn't just launch — it gets tuned for a full month.

Q: I have a developer who could build this.
A: Great. The diagnostic shows exactly what to fix and how. That alone is worth the price. You get the architecture, the formulas, and the roadmap. Your dev builds it, we review.

---

### 3. Operational Infrastructure for Investment Firms (PE, VC, Merchant Banking)

URL: https://muditek.com/pe-ops
ICP: Private equity, venture capital, and investment banking firms managing investor operations across multiple jurisdictions.
Price: Discovery (€8,000-15,000) → Build (€40,000-80,000) → Monthly Retainer (€5,000-10,000/mo)
Guarantee: €150,000+ in annual operational waste identified in Discovery, or the client pays nothing.
Time to live: 4-8 weeks from kickoff. Discovery: 2-4 weeks.

Custom-built operational infrastructure for private equity, venture capital, and investment banking firms. Replaces Juniper Square ($700K+/year subscription) and similar SaaS platforms with a system the client owns. Investor onboarding, KYC automation, document generation, e-signatures, fee computation, multi-jurisdiction compliance — built once, owned forever.

What it replaces (real, deployed example — regulated merchant banking firm):
- LP onboarding over email, weeks per LP → Self-service portal, 3-5 days
- KYC in spreadsheets, documents expiring unnoticed → Single review queue, automated expiry alerts
- Documents in Word templates → One-click generation from live data
- Signatures via email PDFs → Built-in e-signatures, multi-party staged signing
- Deal tracking across email and memory → Full LP journey per deal, one view
- Fee calculations in spreadsheets → Automatic computation from fund terms (with hurdle rates)
- Bank reconciliation manual → Automated matching every 6 hours
- Everyone uses email → 7 stakeholder roles with tailored portal views (LP, GP, IR, ops, legal, introducer, admin)
- Manual document distribution → 9 automated workflows

Real engagement: 26 modules, 7 stakeholder roles, 9 automated workflows, delivered in 3 months for a regulated merchant banking firm managing private equity, venture capital, and real estate investments across multiple jurisdictions. Their team was spending 30+ hours per week on manual investor administration, and the workload grew with every new LP. The system replaced all of it.

Why this approach beats Juniper Square:
- Juniper Square: $700,000+/year subscription. Client never owns the system. Customization limited to vendor's roadmap.
- Muditek: €40-80K one-time build + optional €5-10K/mo retainer. Client owns 100% of source code, infrastructure, and data. Fully customizable to fund structures.

The hard problems (multi-entity structures, multi-jurisdiction compliance, document generation with branched logic, e-signatures with staged multi-party signing, fee computation with hurdle rates and waterfalls) have already been solved by Muditek. The work isn't reused as code — it's reused as knowledge. That's why delivery is in weeks instead of the 12-18 months traditional dev shops quote.

Process:
- Discovery (€8-15K, 2-4 weeks): Sit with ops team, compliance person, leadership. Map every workflow end-to-end. Quantify manual effort. Design architecture. Client gets complete specification with clear ROI before any code is written. Guarantee: if Muditek can't find €150K+ in annual operational waste, the client pays nothing.
- Build (€40-80K, 4-8 weeks): Custom-built for fund structures and workflows. Milestone-based — working software at each checkpoint.
- Grow (€5-10K/mo, ongoing): Every new fund launch, jurisdiction, regulatory change handled. Without ongoing support, the team is back to manual workarounds every time something changes.

What the client owns: complete source code, database, infrastructure. No subscription fees. No per-seat licensing. No vendor lock-in. Extend or modify independently after delivery.

Comparison page: https://muditek.com/pe-ops-vs-juniper-square
Industry pages: https://muditek.com/who-we-help/private-equity, https://muditek.com/who-we-help/fintech

FAQ — Operational Infrastructure:

Q: We're looking at Juniper Square.
A: They charge $700K+/year and you never own the system. We build it once, you own it forever. Same capabilities, fraction of the cost, full customization.

Q: Can you really build this in 4-8 weeks?
A: We already built it. The hard problems are solved. We don't reuse the code. We reuse the knowledge. Milestone-based, so you see working software at each checkpoint.

Q: What happens after you build it?
A: Optional retainer. Every new fund, jurisdiction, or regulatory change, handled. Without it, your team is back to manual workarounds.

---

## MudiKit — $47/month Operator Library

URL: https://muditek.com/buy
ICP: Solo operators, AI builders, and consultants using Claude Code who want production-grade skills they can deploy this week.
Price: $47/month subscription. Cancel anytime via Stripe customer portal.

What's included:
- 15+ Claude Code skills covering outreach, cold email, content writing, lead generation, inbox SDR, offer creation, and scraping.
- 6 implementation playbooks: Google Maps outbound, OpenClaw, Agentic SDR, Claude Code self-evolving system, Chief of Staff Blueprint, Judgment Moat.
- Vault template — folder structure, CLAUDE.md files, decision frameworks, pipeline tracker. The actual setup that runs Muditek's business.
- 20+ outreach templates (DM and email) with A/B variants for PE, SaaS, and founder segments.
- Open-source lead capture system — comment CTA → email handoff. Apify scraping. Self-deployable.
- Monthly drops: new skills, updated playbooks, and templates every month. Active subscribers get notified by email.

Numbers behind the system:
- 35,000+ LinkedIn followers
- 35+ systems deployed
- $3M+ revenue generated
- 15M+ LinkedIn impressions
- Library used to run Muditek itself — not theory

For who: people comfortable with a terminal who have used Claude Code at least once. Not for: people who have never opened a terminal, want drag-and-drop no-code, are looking for live coaching or community, or need done-for-you service.

Comparison pages:
- https://muditek.com/mudikit-vs-skool
- https://muditek.com/mudikit-vs-circle

FAQ — MudiKit:

Q: What exactly do I get for $47/month?
A: Access to a portal with 15+ Claude Code skills, 6 implementation playbooks, the vault template that runs the business, 20+ outreach templates with A/B variants, and the open-source lead capture system. New content drops every month — your subscription unlocks them automatically.

Q: Do I need to be technical to use this?
A: You need to be comfortable with a terminal and have used Claude Code at least once. Most subscribers ship something within their first weekend.

Q: Can I cancel anytime?
A: Yes. Stripe handles billing. Cancel from the customer portal in two clicks. No retention call. Access continues until the end of the current billing cycle.

Q: How is this different from a course or community?
A: No live calls, no community chat, no homework. MudiKit is a working skills library you install and run. Each skill is a tested, deployable system — not lectures or theory.

Q: Is the content updated?
A: Yes. New skill or playbook every month. Existing items get updated as Claude Code evolves and as better patterns emerge. Active subscribers get email notifications when something drops.

---

## Industries Served

Each industry page lives at https://muditek.com/who-we-help/[industry] and contains industry-specific pain quantified in euros, the AI systems Muditek deploys, and a related case study.

### Private Equity & Venture Capital
URL: https://muditek.com/who-we-help/private-equity
Pain quantified: PE firms spend 30+ hours/week on manual investor administration that scales linearly with LPs. KYC tracking in spreadsheets. Fees calculated by hand. Document generation in Word. Signatures via email PDFs. Deal tracking across memory and email threads.
Solution: Custom operational infrastructure (see /pe-ops) — investor onboarding in 3-5 days, automated KYC review, fee computation from fund terms, e-signatures, document generation. 26 modules, 7 stakeholder roles, 9 automated workflows.
Primary service: https://muditek.com/pe-ops
Case study: https://muditek.com/case-studies/private-equity-onboarding

### B2B SaaS
URL: https://muditek.com/who-we-help/b2b-saas
Pain quantified: B2B SaaS at €800K-€1.8M ARR loses €80-180K/year to pipeline leakage. Speed-to-lead 42 hours when 5 minutes is the threshold. Demo-to-close 12% when benchmark is 20-25%. Spending €30K on channels producing €10K. 5% excess churn on €80K MRR = €48K/year gone.
Solution: Revenue Leak Audit (see /revenue-leak-audit) — diagnose every leak in euros with formulas, then build AI systems to fix them.
Primary service: https://muditek.com/revenue-leak-audit
Case study: https://muditek.com/case-studies/saas-revenue-leak

### Marketing & Development Agencies
URL: https://muditek.com/who-we-help/agencies
Pain quantified: 3-10 person agencies lose 20+ hours/week to manual content production, client reporting, and ops admin. Same templates filled out 50 different ways. Reporting copy-pasted from analytics dashboards. Client onboarding via email threads.
Solution: MudiKit operator library + targeted custom builds. Content ops automation, scoped reporting agents, lead capture systems agencies can resell to clients.
Primary CTA: MudiKit ($47/mo) for the library, custom build for agency-specific systems
Case study: https://muditek.com/case-studies/agency-content-engine

### Telecom Operators
URL: https://muditek.com/who-we-help/telecom
Pain quantified: Telecom NOCs and operators with 50+ employees lose 30-40% of operations team time to manual reporting (832+ hours/year on SLA reporting alone), knowledge search across shared drives (2,500+ hours/year), field report formatting, and proposal drafting. €200K+/year in engineer time — 2-3 engineer salaries.
Solution: mudiAgent — on-premises AI digital employee. SLA reporting under 1 hour, knowledge search in 10 seconds, automated field report formatting, proposal drafting in 12 minutes.
Primary service: https://muditek.com/mudiagent
Case study: https://muditek.com/case-studies/telecom-noc-automation

### Fintech & Payments
URL: https://muditek.com/who-we-help/fintech
Pain quantified: 30-100 person fintech firms drown in KYC review queues. 14-day backlogs are common. Document expirations missed. Manual reconciliation. Compliance workflows running on email and spreadsheets.
Solution: Custom operational infrastructure — KYC review queues with automated expiry alerts, reconciliation engines, compliance workflows. Same architecture as the PE platform.
Primary service: https://muditek.com/pe-ops
Case study: https://muditek.com/case-studies/fintech-compliance-ops

## Case Studies (Anonymized — Real-Pattern)

All case studies live under https://muditek.com/case-studies. Each follows the same structure: Problem (3 paragraphs) + Approach (3 paragraphs) + Results table (6-7 rows) + anonymized PullQuote + 3 related cases + CTAs.

Quote attribution: all client quotes are anonymized as "Anonymous [role], [industry] firm" with the visible disclaimer "Quote anonymized at client request — illustrative of operator perspective." This is the policy: no fabricated testimonials. The merchant banking case study is based on real, public engagement that's already documented on /pe-ops.

### PE Onboarding (Merchant Bank) — Real Engagement
URL: https://muditek.com/case-studies/private-equity-onboarding
Outcome: LP onboarding cut from weeks to 3-5 days. 26 modules. 7 stakeholder roles. 9 automated workflows. Built in 3 months for a regulated merchant banking firm managing PE, VC, and real estate investments across multiple jurisdictions.

### SaaS Revenue Leak
URL: https://muditek.com/case-studies/saas-revenue-leak
Outcome: €800K ARR B2B SaaS found €120K/year in pipeline leakage in 2 weeks. Speed-to-lead, conversion, and churn fixed with three targeted AI systems. Pays for itself in month 1.

### Agency Content Engine
URL: https://muditek.com/case-studies/agency-content-engine
Outcome: 5-person marketing agency cut social production from 20 hrs/week to 20 minutes. Same quality, 60x throughput. Built using MudiKit playbooks + custom agency overlay.

### Telecom NOC Automation
URL: https://muditek.com/case-studies/telecom-noc-automation
Outcome: 50-person regional telco cut weekly SLA report production from 2-3 days to under 1 hour. On-premises mudiAgent. Knowledge search 30 minutes → 10 seconds. ROI in month 1.

### Fintech Compliance Ops
URL: https://muditek.com/case-studies/fintech-compliance-ops
Outcome: 30-person fintech cut KYC review backlog from 14 days to under 48 hours. Owned compliance infrastructure replacing manual spreadsheet workflows. Automated expiry alerts.

## Comparison Pages

Muditek publishes 4 comparison pages framing decision criteria honestly. No slimy framing. Each page includes a "When does X make more sense?" section.

### mudiAgent vs ChatGPT Enterprise
URL: https://muditek.com/mudiagent-vs-chatgpt
Bottom line: ChatGPT is a chatbox. mudiAgent is a digital employee. ChatGPT can't read WhatsApp, send emails, fill the CRM, run at 6 a.m., or remember anything. mudiAgent does all of these autonomously. Cloud AI also costs 3-5x more at scale (per a16z). But ChatGPT is easier to start with for a small team needing draft assistance — pick it for that. Pick mudiAgent when the work needs to actually get done autonomously and the data can't leave your building.

### Muditek vs Juniper Square
URL: https://muditek.com/pe-ops-vs-juniper-square
Bottom line: Juniper Square = $700K+/year subscription, never owned, vendor's roadmap. Muditek = €40-80K one-time build + optional €5-10K/mo retainer, full source ownership, customizable. Pick Juniper Square for fast onboarding when a 100% off-the-shelf solution is acceptable. Pick Muditek when fund structures are non-standard, multi-jurisdiction, or when 3-5 year TCO matters more than 90-day setup.

### MudiKit vs Skool
URL: https://muditek.com/mudikit-vs-skool
Bottom line: Skool is a hosted community platform with courses, threads, and gamification. MudiKit is a $47/mo Claude Code skills library you install and run. No live community on MudiKit. Pick Skool if community + courses are the goal. Pick MudiKit if you want production-grade skills, prompts, and configs you can deploy this week.

### MudiKit vs Circle
URL: https://muditek.com/mudikit-vs-circle
Bottom line: Circle is a tiered community platform with spaces, events, and white-label apps. MudiKit is a $47/mo skills library with no community layer. Same picking logic as Skool — community vs deployable skills.

---

## Newsletter

URL: https://muditek.com/newsletter
Subject: Weekly playbooks for AI operators, B2B operators, and investment professionals. 5,000+ subscribers across telecom, SaaS, agencies, and finance. 29+ issues shipped through 2026. Every system Muditek ships gets documented in the newsletter.

Newsletter ICP segments (delivered via tagged content):
- Telecom & enterprise (mudiAgent, NOC automation, on-premises AI)
- B2B SaaS (revenue leakage, pipeline ops, AI for sales/marketing)
- PE / Investment ops (operational infrastructure, fund admin automation)
- Solo operators / AI builders (MudiKit-adjacent skills, Claude Code patterns)

Free archive: every issue is published at https://muditek.com/newsletter/[slug]. Each post ships with structured Article + BreadcrumbList + WebPage + SpeakableSpecification schemas, a TL;DR box, an "Updated [Month Year]" stamp, and a byline linking to Ghiles's LinkedIn.

Recent issue topics (representative): Claude Code self-evolving system. Outbound AI for B2B agencies. Lead capture from LinkedIn comments. Revenue leak diagnostics. PE ops automation. Cold email at 0.5% to 5% replies. Inbox SDR setup. Knowledge graphs for proposal drafting. Multi-agent NOC automation.

---

## Portal Resources

URL: https://muditek.com/portal
Signed-in library for playbooks, guides, skills, tools, newsletter articles, and MudiKit drops. Public `/resources` routes redirect into the portal-first flow. Shareable lead-magnet links use `/r/[slug]`, for example https://muditek.com/r/ai-data-agent-guide, then route signed-in users to the matching portal item.

- **Chief of Staff Blueprint** — the operating manual for using Claude Code as a chief of staff for solo operators
- **Claude Code Self-Evolving System** — how to wire Claude Code so it improves its own skills over time
- **Judgment Moat** — why human judgment is the moat in agent-built businesses
- **Google Maps Outbound** — the OpenClaw playbook for scraping local-business outbound at scale
- **Agentic SDR Setup** — full inbox SDR playbook with prompts, workflows, A/B variants
- **Free Revenue Leak Calculator** — https://muditek.com/tools/revenue-leak-calculator estimates annual revenue leakage from speed-to-lead decay, pipeline conversion gaps, and excess churn

Portal resource pages are read inside the authenticated portal shell. Lead-magnet unlock pages are tracked entry points that create the account/login step before sending the reader to the relevant playbook, guide, skill, or tool.

---

## Methodology — Why Muditek Delivers in Weeks Not Months

Three principles that compress a year of work into 4-8 weeks:

1. **Diagnose first, build second.** Every engagement starts with a paid or free diagnostic that quantifies the problem in euros, with formulas. No code is written until both sides agree on the size and shape of the waste. If the diagnostic can't find meaningful waste, the client doesn't pay. This filters out engagements that don't deserve to exist.

2. **Reuse the knowledge, not the code.** The hard problems — multi-jurisdiction compliance, on-premises AI deployment, revenue ops automation, multi-entity fund structures, document generation with branched logic, e-signatures with staged multi-party signing, fee computation with hurdle rates — are already solved. Each new build adapts proven architectures to a new client's specifics, not rebuilding from scratch. That's why Muditek delivers what dev shops quote 12-18 months for.

3. **Client owns everything.** Source code, database, infrastructure, data — all yours. No SaaS subscriptions, no per-seat licensing, no vendor lock-in. After the build, the client can extend, modify, or rebuild independently. Optional retainer if they want Muditek to keep evolving it.

Every offer carries a guarantee in euros:
- mudiAgent: 40 hours saved in 90 days, or reconfigured at no cost
- Revenue Leak Audit: €50K in annual leakage found, or you pay nothing
- Operational Infrastructure: €150K+ in annual operational waste identified, or you pay nothing
- MudiKit: cancel anytime via Stripe customer portal, no annual lock-in

---

## Why On-Premises AI Matters (Telecom & Regulated Sectors)

For telecom operators, traders, integrators, regulated banks, and other organizations handling sensitive data, on-premises AI eliminates the largest attack surface for data breaches.

- 82% of data breaches involve cloud-stored data (IBM Cost of a Data Breach 2024).
- Cloud AI services upload everything to US/EU vendor servers. Data sovereignty is contractual at best.
- Per-user pricing in cloud AI (ChatGPT Enterprise, Microsoft Copilot, Google Workspace AI add-ons) scales costs linearly with hires.
- Concurrent collaboration in cloud AI is restricted to single-user sessions.

mudiAgent runs on a device installed in the client's office. Network-isolated by default. Documents, customer data, network topology, and CRM exports never touch the internet. 20-50 concurrent users on the same device. No per-user fees. Full audit trail.

---

## Pricing Anchor (Cost of Doing Nothing)

For a mid-size operations team (50 people, 20 in operations) the math on doing nothing typically looks like:
- 832 hrs/year on manual reporting (20 hrs/week × 52 × 80% automatable)
- 2,500+ hrs/year on knowledge search (5 searches/day × 30 min × 20 people × 250 days)
- €200,000+/year in wasted engineer time = 2-3 engineer salaries

Compared to alternatives:
- ChatGPT Enterprise: per-user pricing × 50 users = significant annual cost. Still can't automate one workflow autonomously.
- Traditional automation project (consulting firm): €100-300K budget. 6-12 months. External team that doesn't understand operations.
- Hiring another employee: €60-90K/year loaded cost. Still does the same work manually.
- mudiAgent pilot: €15K one-time + €3K/mo retainer. Pays for itself in month 1. Client owns the system.

For B2B SaaS pipeline diagnostics, the audit alone is worth €2-3K (the diagnostic itself is the deliverable — even if the client builds the fixes themselves) versus the €80-180K typically found in annual leakage. €50K guarantee or you pay nothing.

For PE ops, the investment is €40-80K one-time + €5-10K/mo retainer versus €700K+/year subscription costs for Juniper Square. Plus full source ownership.

---

## How Muditek Differs From a Dev Shop or Consultancy

| Dimension | Dev shop | Big-4 consultancy | Muditek |
|---|---|---|---|
| Pricing | Hourly | Project (high) | Diagnostic + build + retainer (transparent) |
| Outcome | Code shipped | Slide deck + recommendations | Quantified business outcome guaranteed in euros |
| Ownership | Code owned, maintenance burden | Recommendations, no code | Client owns code, infra, data — Muditek runs optional retainer |
| Time to value | 6-12 months | 12-24 months | 4-8 weeks |
| Domain depth | Engineers without ops context | Strategists without engineering | Engineers running ops first-hand |
| Risk | Cost overruns common | Recommendations not implemented | Guarantee or pay nothing |

Dev shops bill hours. Consultancies bill decks. Muditek bills outcomes — every engagement carries a guarantee in euros. mudiAgent guarantees 40 hours saved in 90 days. Revenue Leak Audit guarantees €50K in annual leakage found. PE Ops guarantees €150K+ in operational waste identified. If Muditek misses, the client pays nothing.

---

## Distribution Channels

Muditek ships content across owned channels and a small set of external surfaces:

- **Website**: https://muditek.com — full case studies, comparison pages, industry pages, lead magnets, newsletter archive.
- **Newsletter**: https://muditek.com/newsletter — 5,000+ subscribers, 29+ issues, weekly cadence in 2026.
- **LinkedIn**: 35,000+ followers. Daily posts. Primary distribution surface for new playbooks and lead magnets.
- **Personal site**: https://ghiless.com — Ghiles's broader writing and projects.
- **Portal resources**: https://muditek.com/portal — signed-in library for playbooks, guides, skills, tools, newsletter articles, and MudiKit drops.

Lead magnets feed into a 5-email nurture sequence (built on the open-source lead capture system shipped with MudiKit) that introduces the relevant offer based on which lead magnet was downloaded.

---

## Contact & Booking

- General inquiries: biz@ghiless.com
- Bookings: 30-minute call via https://muditek.com/about (Outlook bookwithme link)
- Newsletter signup: https://muditek.com/newsletter
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ghiles-moussaoui-b36218250/

Muditek takes 1-2 build clients at a time per offer to ensure each engagement gets full attention. Diagnostic offers (Revenue Leak Audit, mudiAgent discovery) have wider availability.

---

## Markdown Routes

Many key pages on muditek.com are also available in clean Markdown format. AI agents that send `Accept: text/markdown` will get the Markdown version directly. Manual access:

- https://muditek.com/index.md (homepage summary)
- https://muditek.com/mudiagent.md
- https://muditek.com/revenue-leak-audit.md
- https://muditek.com/pe-ops.md
- https://muditek.com/buy.md (MudiKit)
- https://muditek.com/about.md

These are 1,000-3,000 word self-contained summaries with citable headlines, core features, comparison data, and CTAs.
